# Monogrowl

## About
Monogrowl is an electronic music project by Tyler Langan, based in Sheffield, UK. The project creates textural, evolving music inspired by analogue and organic sounds, drawing from genres including electronica, ambient, IDM, progressive electronic, and minimal techno. Founded in 2018.

## Artist
- Name: Monogrowl
- Real name: Tyler Langan
- Location: Sheffield, UK
- Founded: 2018
- Genres: Electronica, Ambient, IDM, Progressive Electronic, Minimal Techno

## Releases
- Overflown (Single, 2024) — https://open.spotify.com/album/2vgmjUCApm3U96bzqMrLVg
- Monogrowl (Single, 2018) — https://open.spotify.com/album/4I14AwWBSp4KhHPtqqOmKR
